description: Results from a batch operation on tickets.
name: BatchResponseTicket

id.description: The unique identifier for the ticket.

properties.description: The ticket's properties as key-value pairs.

createdAt.description: The date and time the ticket was created.

updatedAt.description: The date and time the ticket was last updated.

archived.description: Whether the ticket has been archived.

associations.description: The ticket's associations with other CRM objects.
